class.name: custom_franka_controllers/CartesianVelocityExampleController
class.description: The cartesian velocity example controller commands linear velocity with x and z components.

class.name: custom_franka_controllers/CartesianForceToVelocityController
class.description: The cartesian force to velocity controller commands linear velocity to reach a certain target force.

class.name: custom_franka_controllers/CartesianAccelerationController
class.description: The cartesian acceleration example controller commands linear acceleration with x, y, and z components.

class.name: custom_franka_controllers/CartesianVelocityControllerSES
class.description: The cartesian velocity example controller commands linear velocity with x, y, and z components.

class.name: custom_franka_controllers/CartesianForceController
class.description: The cartesian force example controller commands linear force with x, y, and z components.

class.name: custom_franka_controllers/JointImpedanceIKController
class.description: The joint impedance controller with inverse kinematics for teleoperation.
